mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY AD.DONG_NO, AD.HO, HH.MOVE_IN_DT DESC, M.USER_NM ) rn,
M.USER_NO AS userNo, M.USER_ID AS userId, M.USER_NM AS userNm, M.USER_TELNO AS userTelno, M.USER_EML AS userEml, MO.MGMT_OFC_NO AS mgmtOfcNo, AC.APT_CMPLEX_NO AS aptCmplexNo, AC.APT_CMPLEX_NM AS complexName, HH.HO_NO AS hoNo, AD.DONG_NO AS dong, AD.HO AS ho, HH.INOUT_CD AS inoutCd,
CASE HH.INOUT_CD WHEN 'WAIT' THEN '입주대기' WHEN 'LIVE' THEN '입주' WHEN 'OUT' THEN '퇴거' WHEN 'MID' THEN '중도퇴거' ELSE HH.INOUT_CD END AS inoutNm,
CASE HH.INOUT_CD WHEN 'WAIT' THEN 'WAIT' WHEN 'LIVE' THEN 'LIVE' WHEN 'OUT' THEN 'OUT' WHEN 'MID' THEN 'MID' ELSE HH.INOUT_CD END AS moveStatus,
HH.HEAD_YN AS headYn,
CASE HH.HEAD_YN WHEN 'Y' THEN '세대주' ELSE '세대원' END AS headYnNm,
TO_CHAR(HH.MOVE_IN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS moveInDt, TO_CHAR(HH.MOVE_OUT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS moveOutDt
FROM HSHLD_HEAD HH INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON M.USER_NO = HH.USER_NO INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL AD ON AD.HO_NO = HH.HO_NO INNER JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AU.DONG_NO = AD.DONG_NO INNER JOIN APT_COMPLEX AC ON AC.APT_CMPLEX_NO = AU.APT_CMPLEX_NO INNER JOIN MGMT_OFFICE MO ON MO.APT_CMPLEX_NO = AC.APT_CMPLEX_NO
) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT M.USER_NO AS userNo, M.USER_ID AS userId, M.USER_NM AS userNm, M.USER_TELNO AS userTelno, M.USER_EML AS userEml, MO.MGMT_OFC_NO AS mgmtOfcNo, AC.APT_CMPLEX_NO AS aptCmplexNo, AC.APT_CMPLEX_NM AS complexName, HH.HO_NO AS hoNo, AD.DONG_NO AS dong, AD.HO AS ho, HH.INOUT_CD AS inoutCd, CASE HH.INOUT_CD WHEN 'WAIT' THEN '입주대기' WHEN 'LIVE' THEN '입주' WHEN 'OUT' THEN '퇴거' WHEN 'MID' THEN '중도퇴거' ELSE HH.INOUT_CD END AS inoutNm, HH.INOUT_CD AS moveStatus, HH.HEAD_YN AS headYn, CASE HH.HEAD_YN WHEN 'Y' THEN '세대주' ELSE '세대원' END AS headYnNm, TO_CHAR(HH.MOVE_IN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS moveInDt, TO_CHAR(HH.MOVE_OUT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS moveOutDt FROM HSHLD_HEAD HH INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON M.USER_NO = HH.USER_NO INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL AD ON AD.HO_NO = HH.HO_NO INNER JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AU.DONG_NO = AD.DONG_NO INNER JOIN APT_COMPLEX AC ON AC.APT_CMPLEX_NO = AU.APT_CMPLEX_NO INNER JOIN MGMT_OFFICE MO ON MO.APT_CMPLEX_NO = AC.APT_CMPLEX_NO WHERE MO.MGMT_OFC_NO = #{mgmtOfcNo} AND M.USER_NO = #{userNo} AND HH.HO_NO = #{hoNo}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO HSHLD_HEAD ( USER_NO, HO_NO, INOUT_CD, MOVE_IN_DT, MOVE_OUT_DT, HEAD_YN ) VALUES ( #{userNo}, #{hoNo}, #{inoutCd},
TO_DATE(#{moveInDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
SYSDATE
,
TO_DATE(#{moveOutDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
NULL
, #{headYn} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE HSHLD_HEAD
HO_NO = #{hoNo},
INOUT_CD = #{inoutCd},
MOVE_IN_DT = TO_DATE(#{moveInDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
MOVE_IN_DT = NULL,
MOVE_OUT_DT = TO_DATE(#{moveOutDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
MOVE_OUT_DT = NULL,
HEAD_YN = #{headYn},
WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND HO_NO = #{hoNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM HSHLD_HEAD HH INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON M.USER_NO = HH.USER_NO INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL AD ON AD.HO_NO = HH.HO_NO INNER JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AU.DONG_NO = AD.DONG_NO INNER JOIN APT_COMPLEX AC ON AC.APT_CMPLEX_NO = AU.APT_CMPLEX_NO INNER JOIN MGMT_OFFICE MO ON MO.APT_CMPLEX_NO = AC.APT_CMPLEX_NO
SELECT USER_NO AS userNo, USER_NM AS userNm, USER_TELNO AS userTelno FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}
